zh.Towcester, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特
zh.Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England: 英國諾薩普頓史爾帕迪夏拉爾
zh.Northumberland, England, United Kingdom: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Pateshulle於大約1192年出生在英國英格蘭貝德福爾時，他的父親Simon de Pateshulle28歲，母親Amice23歲。他於1219年之前與Margaret Argentine在英國諾薩普頓史爾帕迪夏拉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾被列為sherriff of buckingham。他去世於1232年8月20日在英國諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特享年41歲。

zh-hans.Towcester, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特
zh-hans.Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England: 英国諾薩普頓史爾帕迪夏拉爾
zh-hans.Northumberland, England, United Kingdom: 英国英格兰諾圖波藍德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Pateshulle于大约1192年出生在英国英格兰貝德福爾时，他的父亲Simon de Pateshulle28岁，母亲Amice23岁。他于1219年之前与Margaret Argentine在英国諾薩普頓史爾帕迪夏拉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾被列为sherriff of buckingham。他去世于1232年8月20日在英国諾薩普頓史爾堂可斯特享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Pateshulle was born about 1192, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Simon de Pateshulle, was 28 and his mother, Amice, was 23. He married Margaret Argentine before 1219, in Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. His occupation is listed as sherriff of buckingham in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. He died on 20 August 1232, in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Pateshulle est né environ 1192, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Simon de Pateshulle, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Amice, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Argentine avant 1219, à Pattishall, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est sherriff of buckingham à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 20 août 1232, à Towcester, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Pateshulle um 1192 in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Simon de Pateshulle 28 und seine Mutter Amice 23. Er hat vor 1219 in Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England Margaret Argentine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. sein Beruf ist als sherriff of buckingham in Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 20. August 1232 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Towcester, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Pateshulle è nato il circa 1192 nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Simon de Pateshulle, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Amice, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Argentine prima del 1219, nel Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. La sua occupazione è indicata come sherriff of buckingham nel Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 20 agosto 1232, nel Towcester, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.Towcester, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアトウセスター
ja.Bedfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイア
ja.Pattishall, Northamptonshire, England: イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプアッティシャル
ja.Northumberland, England, United Kingdom: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Pateshulleが約1192年にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Simon de Pateshulleは28歳，母Amiceは23歳であった。1219年以前にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプアッティシャルでMargaret Argentineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでの職業はsherriff of buckinghamと記録されている。彼は1232年8月20日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアトウセスターで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Pateshulle(이)가 대략 1192년 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Simon de Pateshulle(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Amice(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1219년 이전 영국 노르섬프토실르 패티샤에서 Margaret Argentine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르에서 sherriff of buckingham이었다. 그는 1232년 8월 20일 영국 노르섬프토실르 타우스스터에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Northumberland, England, United Kingdom: Norðhymbra land, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Pateshulle nasceu aproximadamente 1192, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Simon de Pateshulle, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Amice, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Argentine antes 1219, em Pattishall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Sua profissão aparece como sherriff of buckingham em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 20 de agosto de 1232, em Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Pateshulle родился около 1192 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Simon de Pateshulle было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Amice, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Argentine перед 1219 г. в местности паттишолл, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.  Он работал по профессии sherriff of buckingham в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 20 августа 1232 г. в местности тоусестир, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Pateshulle nació aproximadamente 1192, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Simon de Pateshulle, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Amice, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret Argentine antes de 1219, en Pattishall, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Su ocupación registrada era sherriff of buckingham en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 20 de agosto de 1232, en Towcester, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años.
